allow: PowerShell(Get-ChildItem "C:\\Program Files\\nodejs" -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; Get-ChildItem "$env:APPDATA\\npm" -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; Test-Path "C:\\Program Files\\nodejs\\node.exe")
PowerShell(Get-ChildItem C:\\live_ops -Recurse -Exclude node_modules,.next,.claude | Where-Object { !$_.PSIsContainer } | Select-Object -ExpandProperty FullName | Sort-Object)
PowerShell($env:PATH = "C:\\Program Files\\nodejs;" + $env:PATH; cd C:\\live_ops; npm run dev 2>&1)
